timetable: AI & DS First Year First Semester timetable is available for Sections A, B, C, and D. You can ask about specific sections, days, or subjects.
first year timetable: AI & DS First Year First Semester has 4 sections (A, B, C, D) with classes from Monday to Saturday. Subjects include LAC, EP, BEEE, Introduction to Programming, Engineering Graphics, and various labs.
aids timetable: AI & DS First Year First Semester timetable includes theory classes, labs (CP Lab, EP Lab), and workshops (EEE Workshop, IT Workshop) across 4 sections.
1st year timetable: First year AI & DS students have classes in 4 sections with subjects like Linear Algebra & Calculus, Engineering Physics, BEEE, Programming, and Engineering Graphics.
section a: Section A timetable for AI & DS First Year includes classes from Monday to Saturday. Key subjects: LAC, EP, BEEE, Introduction to Programming, Engineering Graphics, and labs.

linear algebra & calculus: Linear Algebra & Calculus (LAC) is taught in AI & DS First Year First Semester across all sections.
lac: LAC stands for Linear Algebra & Calculus. It's part of the AI & DS First Year curriculum.
engineering physics: Engineering Physics (EP) is taught in AI & DS First Year First Semester across all sections.
ep: EP stands for Engineering Physics. It's part of the AI & DS First Year curriculum.
basic electrical and electronics enginee: Basic Electrical and Electronics Engineering (BEEE) is taught in AI & DS First Year First Semester across all sections.
beee: BEEE stands for Basic Electrical and Electronics Engineering. It's part of the AI & DS First Year curriculum.
introduction to programming: Introduction to Programming (I_P) is taught in AI & DS First Year First Semester across all sections.
i_p: I_P stands for Introduction to Programming. It's part of the AI & DS First Year curriculum.
nss/ncc/scouts and guides/community serv: NSS/NCC/Scouts and Guides/Community Service (NGCS) is taught in AI & DS First Year First Semester across all sections.
ngcs: NGCS stands for NSS/NCC/Scouts and Guides/Community Service. It's part of the AI & DS First Year curriculum.
computer programming lab: Computer Programming Lab (CP LAB) is taught in AI & DS First Year First Semester across all sections.
cp lab: Computer Programming Lab (CP LAB) is conducted for all AI & DS First Year sections. Different sections have it on different days.
engineering physics lab: Engineering Physics Lab (EP-LAB) is taught in AI & DS First Year First Semester across all sections.
ep-lab: EP-LAB stands for Engineering Physics Lab. It's part of the AI & DS First Year curriculum.
eee workshop: EEE Workshop is conducted for all sections: Section A (Thursday 2-4), Section B (Monday 2-4), Section C (Wednesday 10-12), Section D (Wednesday 2-4).
eee ws: EEE WS stands for EEE Workshop. It's part of the AI & DS First Year curriculum.
it workshop: IT Workshop is scheduled for all sections: Section A (Saturday 2-4), Section B (Saturday 1-2), Section C (Saturday 2-4), Section D (Saturday 2-4).
it ws: IT WS stands for IT Workshop. It's part of the AI & DS First Year curriculum.
engineering graphics: ENGINEERING GRAPHICS stands for Engineering Graphics. It's part of the AI & DS First Year curriculum.
programming lab: Computer Programming Lab is available for all sections. Section A: Thursday 9-12, Section B: Thursday 1-4, Section C: Tuesday 9-12, Section D: Tuesday 1-4.
ep lab: Engineering Physics Lab (EP-LAB) is conducted for all sections on different days with practical experiments.
physics lab: Engineering Physics Lab: Section A (Friday 9-12), Section B (Thursday 9-12), Section C (Monday 9-12), Section D (Saturday 9-12).
morning classes: Morning classes (9-12) in AI & DS First Year include theory subjects like LAC, EP, BEEE, and labs like CP Lab, EP Lab, and Engineering Graphics.
afternoon classes: Afternoon classes (1-4) include labs, workshops, and continuation of theory subjects across all sections.
